zh.lifeSummary: 當Lucy of Bolingbroke於大約1067年出生在英國林可爾史爾時，她的父親Turold, Sheriff of Lincolnshire44歲，母親Malet24歲。她於大約1082年與Ivo de Taillebois結婚。她去世於1138年在英國林可爾史爾斯沃爾德享年72歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾斯伯丁。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lucy of Bolingbroke于大约1067年出生在英国林可爾史爾时，她的父亲Turold, Sheriff of Lincolnshire44岁，母亲Malet24岁。她于大约1082年与Ivo de Taillebois结婚。她去世于1138年在英国林可爾史爾斯沃爾德享年72岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾斯伯丁。

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Lucie, the vernacular form of Lucia . It is sometimes assumed that Lucy is a pet form of Lucinda , but there is no etymological justification for this assumption. It was in fairly widespread use in the Middle Ages, and increased greatly in popularity in the 18th century and again in the 1990s. In Ireland it serves as an Anglicized form of Irish Luíseach .

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Lucy of Bolingbroke was born about 1067, in Lincolnshire, England, her father, Turold, Sheriff of Lincolnshire, was 44 and her mother, Malet, was 24. She married Ivo de Taillebois about 1082. She died in 1138, in Stixwould, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 72, and was buried in Spalding, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, Unite: Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lucy of Bolingbroke est née environ 1067, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Turold, Sheriff of Lincolnshire, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Malet, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Ivo de Taillebois environ 1082. Elle est décédée en 1138, à Stixwould, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterrée à Spalding, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lucy of Bolingbroke um 1067 in Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Turold, Sheriff of Lincolnshire 44 und ihre Mutter Malet 24. Sie hat um 1082 Ivo de Taillebois geheiratet. Sie starb 1138 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Stixwould, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in Spalding, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lucy of Bolingbroke è nata il circa 1067 nel Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, Turold, Sheriff of Lincolnshire, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Malet, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Ivo de Taillebois circa 1082. Morì nel 1138, nel Stixwould, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolta a Spalding, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lucy of Bolingbrokeが約1067年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Turold, Sheriff of Lincolnshireは44歳，母Maletは24歳であった。約1082年にIvo de Tailleboisと結婚した。彼女は1138年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスティクスウオウルドで72歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアスプアルディングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lucy of Bolingbroke(이)가 대략 1067년 영국 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Turold, Sheriff of Lincolnshire(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Malet(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1082년 Ivo de Taillebois(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1138년 영국 링코실르 스티스보우드에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 스팔딩에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lucy of Bolingbroke nasceu aproximadamente 1067, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Turold, Sheriff of Lincolnshire, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Malet, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Ivo de Taillebois aproximadamente 1082. Ela faleceu em 1138, em Stixwould, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 72 anos, e foi sepultada em Spalding, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lucy of Bolingbroke родилась около 1067 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Turold, Sheriff of Lincolnshire было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Malet, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ivo de Taillebois около 1082 г. Она умерла в 1138 г. в местности стиксвоулд, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 72 лет и была похоронена в местности спалдинг, линколншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lucy of Bolingbroke nació aproximadamente 1067, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Turold, Sheriff of Lincolnshire, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Malet, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Ivo de Taillebois aproximadamente 1082. Murió en 1138, en Stixwould, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultada en Spalding, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
